creator: pizik@dubna.ru
text:
I have integrated motherboard and my sound device is not recognized by kernel.
I found it's vendor id  (it is 8086) and device id (it is 2445) device is called "Intel 82801BA AC'97 audio".

How-To-Repeat: I also found beta-version of the driver for my sound card. It is placed on http://www.katsurajima.seya.yokohama.jp/ich/. It is workin' driver but it is non stable. Please fix the problem.
